release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 57. Fixes the missing Nightscout SAGE helper required to process Sensor Start, Sensor Change, Sensor Insert and related SAGE events. Includes the alarm snooze reset logic so audio mute clears when glucose leaves the alarm state or changes alarm class, allowing a new alarm episode to sound immediately. Also retains midnight-to-midnight daily bolus totals, Nightscout IOB/COB auto-read, centered night screen, random audio alarm patterns, caregiver WhatsApp routing, Wi-Fi profile handling, and consolidated web UI.
